name: marketingskills
description: A comprehensive collection of marketing skills and capabilities tailored for Claude Code and AI agents, covering conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

inputs.name: marketing_data
inputs.description: Input data relevant to marketing tasks such as website analytics, copy drafts, SEO keywords, or growth metrics.

inputs.name: task_description
inputs.description: Description of the specific marketing task or objective to be accomplished by the AI agent.

outputs.name: marketing_strategy
outputs.description: Generated marketing plans or strategies based on input data.

outputs.name: copywriting_content
outputs.description: SEO-optimized or CRO-focused marketing copy content created for campaigns.

outputs.name: analytics_report
outputs.description: Insights and analysis derived from marketing analytics data.

outputs.name: growth_recommendations
outputs.description: Suggestions and engineering techniques to drive growth.

steps: Collect and input relevant marketing data and task description
Analyze data with SEO, CRO, analytics, or growth engineering techniques
Generate optimized marketing copy or strategic recommendations
Evaluate and refine generated content or strategies based on feedback or performance data
Deploy marketing outputs with AI agent assistance
use_cases: Automated generation of high-converting landing page copy
SEO optimization for website content using AI
Generating analytics insights from user or campaign data
Designing and implementing growth-driven engineering strategies
AI-assisted marketing campaign planning and execution
patterns: Copywriting with AI natural language generation

prompt_templates.name: generate_cro_copy
prompt_templates.template: Create high-converting copy for a landing page targeting {target_audience} promoting {product_service}.

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization
prompt_templates.template: Optimize the following content for SEO with keywords: {keywords}. Content: {content}

prompt_templates.name: analytics_insights
prompt_templates.template: Analyze this marketing analytics data and provide actionable insights: {analytics_data}

prompt_templates.name: growth_engineering_plan
prompt_templates.template: Develop a growth engineering plan to increase {metric} for {product_service}.
